context: Evaluates the agent's ability to read and summarise the context index by type and status when asked what context files exist.

checklist.name: Summary by type
checklist.description: Context files summarised by type (plans, findings, analysis)

checklist.name: Status breakdown
checklist.description: Status breakdown (draft, active, done) included for each type

checklist.name: No manual edits
checklist.description: Correctly states not to edit index.yaml by hand
